assessment.note: Lack of substantive feedback on key decisions signals weak alignment and muted ownership around current priorities; also hints at support friction.

new_queue.label: Decision feedback
new_queue.name: On key decisions, what feedback are you not getting that you need?
new_queue.description: Drills into the missing feedback so the manager can see whether the gap is quality, speed, or alignment.

new_queue.label: Load relief
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks lighter for you?
new_queue.description: Finds one concrete change that would reduce strain without opening a new agenda.

new_queue.label: Hand-off friction
new_queue.name: What makes it hard to hand more of this off?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether the bottleneck is trust, process, or team capability.
